leadText: Battle Armor (Japanese: カブトアーマー Kabuto Armor) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Battle Armor prevents the Pokémon from receiving a critical hit , even from moves that normally always land one, namely Frost Breath , Storm Throw , Wicked Blow , Surging Strikes , Flower Trick , and any move boosted by Merciless (if the Pokémon is poisoned ) or Laser Focus . Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Battle Armor has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Battle Armor prevents the Pokémon from receiving a critical hit , even from moves that normally always land one, namely Frost Breath , Storm Throw , Wicked Blow , Surging Strikes , Flower Trick , and any move boosted by Merciless (if the Pokémon is poisoned ) or Laser Focus .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Blocks critical hits. MD T D S Blocks critical hits on the Pokémon. B S L こうげきを きゅうしょに うけない Conq. The Pokémon is protected against critical hits. MD GtI Unavailable S MD Moves don't hit the Pokémon critically! Never ever! MD RT DX Moves are never critical hits against this Pokémon.
